tooltip: Select Queen Oren as your hero of choice.

heroSelectionDescriptionElements.tooltipText: Queen Oren focuses on Zol units.
Allows you to summon Queen Oren, a frenzied Melee hero.
Access to Feral, glass canon infantry, Sludge Shark, powerful melee creature, and Mucktorocks, support mages.
Zol units have a higher chance to spawn units upon death.
Health Regeneration rate of Riverzora units increased
